hero.title: Amanda Mind Care
hero.description: Thola ukwesekwa kochwepheshe okuhambisana nezidingo zakho endaweni ephephile, eyimfihlo futhi enobuntu obujulile.

services.title: Ukwesekwa okuhambisana nesidingo ngasinye
services.subtitle: Izixazululo zokwelapha eziklanyelwe ukukweseka ngozwelo, ubuchwepheshe nobumfihlo.

items.title: Ukubonisana komuntu ngamunye
items.description: Ukwesekwa okwenziwe ngokwezifiso ukuze uqonde imizwa yakho futhi ubuyisele ibhalansi eqhubekayo.

items.title: Ukwelashwa kwabashadile
items.description: Qinisa ubudlelwano bakho ngendawo yokulalela nokuxhumana eqondiswa uchwepheshe.

items.title: Ukulawula ukucindezeleka
items.description: Funda amasu okunciphisa ukukhathazeka nokubuyisa ukuthula empilweni yakho yansuku zonke.

about.title: Isazi sakho sokuthembeka
about.paragraph1: Kwa-Amanda Mind Care sikholelwa ukuthi wonke umuntu ufanele ukwesekwa okuhloniphekile, okwenziwe ngokwezifiso futhi okuyimfihlo. Sihlanganisa ulwazi, ukulalela nokwelashwa kwesimanje.
about.paragraph2: Indlela yethu igxile kumuntu, ihlonipha indaba yakho, ithemba kanye nozwelo ukuze kuzuze imiphumela eqhubekayo.

process.title: Uhambo lwakho lokwesekwa isinyathelo ngesinyathelo
process.subtitle: Isinyathelo ngasinye siklanyelwe ukukududuza futhi sikuholele ekulinganeni okuhlala isikhathi eside.

steps.title: Ukuxhumana
steps.description: Uxhumana nathi kalula ukuze ubuze noma ubeke isikhathi endaweni ephephile neyimfihlo.

steps.title: Ukubonisana
steps.description: Isikhathi somuntu ngamunye, ubuso nobuso noma ku-inthanethi, ukuhlola izidingo zakho.

steps.title: Ukulandelela
steps.description: Ukulandelela okuqhubekayo ukuze kuqiniswe intuthuko yakho nokugcina ibhalansi yakho yengqondo.

testimonials.title: Ubufakazi
testimonials.subtitle: Bona okuhlangenwe nakho kweziguli zethu nomthelela omuhle wokwesekwa kwethu.

items.text: Ngazizwa ngiqondwa futhi ngisekelwa kuyo yonke inqubo.
items.author: Isiguli

contact.title: Xhumana
contact.subtitle: Ukuze ubuze noma ubeke isikhathi, sebenzisa le fomu ephephile.

footer.description: Ihhovisi lamazwe ngamazwe elisebenza ngokwesekwa kwengqondo okuseqophelweni eliphezulu, lihlanganisa ulwazi lomuntu nobuchwepheshe besimanje.

bottom.rights: © 2026 Amanda Mind Care — Wonke amalungelo agodliwe
